why_this_action.summary: The execution board had no truthful do-now outbound packet in the active short review window, so the strongest move available was to improve the current directory-confirmation lane itself. The fresh backlink refresh exposed a concrete runtime flaw: after the first Google HTTP 429, the tracker kept sending the remaining search burst anyway.
shared_findings_used: agents/marketing/logs/adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: same-family outbound overlap is still active
drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
agents/marketing/logs/backlink_status_latest.json: fresh refresh showed Google 429 rate limiting across the search check stage
agents/marketing/logs/reddit_execution_status_latest.json: Reddit remains blocked, so this slot should not be spent there

expected_outcome: Future directory-confirmation refreshes stop after the first Google 429 instead of hammering the remaining search burst, preserving cleaner measurement truth while keeping the live listing proof current.
